title: Spicy Italian Corn Fritters
description: A crispy, spicy twist on traditional corn fritters. Serve as a side dish or snack.

ingredients.name: Spicy
ingredients.notes: red pepper flakes or more to taste

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour and spices.
Add corn and stir until combined.
Add gooey ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, drop dough onto a plate or tray.
Heat about 1-2 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few fritters to the pan and fry until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove fritters from oil and place on a paper towel.
Repeat with remaining dough, adjusting heat as needed.
